name: Potato Pancakes 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate potatoes just before using to prevent discolouration.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and beat until well blended.
3. Add the grated potatoes to the mixture.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into hot fat in a frying pan.
5. Spread the pancakes flat.
6. Fry on medium heat until crisp and golden brown on the underside.
7. Turn and fry the other side until cooked through.
8. Serve with sour cream or apple sauce, or both.
